ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, all fields legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, all fields legible.

document_pairing.method: Certificate references Invoice 776069; invoice file contains Invoice 776069. Consignor Volvo Merchandise AB matches invoice issuer.

criteria_met: Invoice number 776069 in certificate matches invoice number 776069 in invoice file.
Consignor Volvo Merchandise AB identified in invoice visiting address block.
Consignee Volvo Group Korea Ltd identified in invoice invoicing address.

locations_found: Invoice, page 1, Visiting address block: 'Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons gata 5, 40508 GÖTEBORG, Sweden'
Invoice, page 1, VAT no: SE556744915101 (SE-prefix confirms Sweden)

lc_check.reasoning: No LC/Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. Remarks field contains 'W261250 Invoice 776069' which is an order number and invoice reference, not an LC reference.

consignor.certificate_value: Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons gata 5, SE-40508, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons gata 5, 40508 GÖTEBORG, Sweden (Visiting address block)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Volvo Merchandise AB' anywhere in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND in Visiting address block: 'Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons gata 5, 40508 GÖTEBORG, Sweden'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor country: Sweden. Invoice visiting address: Sweden. VAT prefix SE confirms Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice visiting address block.
Land verification via explicit address (Sweden) and VAT prefix SE.

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Volvo Merchandise AB' at 'Bror Nilssons gata 5, SE-40508, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice visiting address block explicitly states 'Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons gata 5, 40508 GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Name matches exactly after normalization. Country Sweden confirmed by explicit address and VAT number prefix SE. Rule 4.1.0 gives MATCH before sequential testing of 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6 is needed.
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Volvo Merchandise AB' is explicitly identified in the invoice's visiting address block with matching address and country (Sweden). MATCH per rule 4.1.0.

consignee.certificate_value: Volvo Group Korea Ltd, Volvo Bldg., 5th fl., 726-173 Hannam-dong, Yongsan-gu 140-210 Seoul, Korea, Republic of
consignee.invoice_value: Volvo Group Korea Ltd, Volvo Bldg., 5th fl., 726-173 Hannam-dong, Yongsan-gu, 140-210 Seoul, Korea (Invoicing address)

comparison_steps.description: Invoice 'Invoicing address' field contains 'Volvo Group Korea Ltd'.
comparison_steps.result: Consignee name found in primary billing field.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Korea, Republic of'. Invoice: 'Korea'. These are normalized equivalents for the same country (Republic of Korea / South Korea).

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 – consignee identified in invoice's primary invoicing address field.
Country normalization: 'Korea, Republic of' ↔ 'Korea' accepted as equivalent.

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Volvo Group Korea Ltd' in 'Korea, Republic of'. Invoice invoicing address (primary billing field per 4.2.0.2) explicitly states 'Volvo Group Korea Ltd' at 'Volvo Bldg., 5th fl., 726-173 Hannam-dong, Yongsan-gu, 140-210 Seoul, Korea'. Name matches exactly. Country 'Korea, Republic of' vs 'Korea' – standard normalization of full name vs short form for South Korea. MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Volvo Group Korea Ltd' is explicitly identified in the invoice's invoicing address (primary billing field). Country 'Korea, Republic of' normalizes to 'Korea'. MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value: 7 pcs - 113066 Short Winter Jacket, CLR 99, Size M, CN; 4 pcs - 113066 Short Winter Jacket, CLR 99, Size L, CN; 13 pcs - 113470 Iron Mark Pin (10 pack), CN
goods_description.invoice_value: 113066 Short Winter Jacket Conf.1 Colour 99 Size M CoO CN Qty 7; 113066 Short Winter Jacket Conf.1 Colour 99 Size L CoO CN Qty 4; 113470 Iron Mark Pin (10-pack) Conf.2 CoO CN Qty 13

comparison_steps.description: Certificate article numbers: 113066, 113470. Invoice article numbers: 113066, 113470.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 – Text matching for item 1: 113066 Short Winter Jacket, Size M
comparison_steps.description: Certificate: '113066 Short Winter Jacket, CLR 99, Size M'. Invoice: '113066 Short Winter Jacket Conf.1 Colour 99 Size M'. Identity-bearing designation 'Short Winter Jacket' matches. Article number 113066 matches. Size M matches. CLR 99 = Colour 99.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 – Text matching for item 2: 113066 Short Winter Jacket, Size L
comparison_steps.description: Certificate: '113066 Short Winter Jacket, CLR 99, Size L'. Invoice: '113066 Short Winter Jacket Conf.1 Colour 99 Size L'. Same analysis as item 1 with Size L.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 – Text matching for item 3: 113470 Iron Mark Pin (10 pack)
comparison_steps.description: Certificate: '113470 Iron Mark Pin (10 pack)'. Invoice: '113470 Iron Mark Pin (10-pack)'. Identity-bearing designation 'Iron Mark Pin (10 pack)' vs '(10-pack)' – difference is only a hyphen, allowed normalization.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 – Article numbers 113066 and 113470 match exactly between certificate and invoice.
Identity-bearing designations 'Short Winter Jacket' and 'Iron Mark Pin (10 pack)' match after normalization (hyphen).
Additional non-identity-bearing data (Conf., CLR/Colour, CN origin codes) do not affect product identity.

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate lists three item lines with article numbers 113066 (two size variants) and 113470. Invoice has the same three lines with identical article numbers. Descriptions match: 'Short Winter Jacket' appears identically in both. 'Iron Mark Pin (10 pack)' vs '(10-pack)' differs only by hyphen – allowed normalization. Quantities per line (7, 4, 13 pcs) match between documents. All items verified via Priority 1 (article numbers) and confirmed via Priority 2 (text matching).
goods_description.motivation: All three article numbers (113066, 113470) match exactly. Product descriptions ('Short Winter Jacket', 'Iron Mark Pin') match after allowed normalization of hyphen. MATCH.

quantity.invoice_value: Line weights: 9.10 Kg + 5.20 Kg + 0.39 Kg = 14.69 Kg (sum of per-line weights)

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7: '14,69 KG NET'. Looking for 14.69 in invoice. No explicit total net weight field found in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Value 14.69 not found as explicit total in invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Both values in KG – no MT/KG conversion needed.
Certificate does not state per-piece weight; states total. Not applicable.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.5.1 – Sequential exception testing: 3D (Summation of multiple rows)
comparison_steps.description: Certificate states total 14.69 KG NET. Invoice has three lines with Kg values: 9.10, 5.20, 0.39. Sum = 9.10 + 5.20 + 0.39 = 14.69 Kg. Certificate total = 14.69 KG NET. All lines belong to same invoice 776069 and same consignment. All values in Kg (same unit). Sum 14.69 = 14.69. Within tolerance (0%).

rules_applied.description: Certificate states '14,69 KG NET' – numeric value 14.69, unit KG, category NET. All required elements present.
Box 7 contains '14,69 KG NET' – this is the verification-grounding quantity.

Exception 3D – Summation of multiple rows within same invoice. Three rows: 9.10 + 5.20 + 0.39 = 14.69 Kg. Matches certificate's 14.69 KG NET exactly. Same unit (Kg). All rows from same invoice. Tolerance check: 0% deviation.

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '14,69 KG NET' (14.69 kg net weight). Invoice does not have an explicit total weight field. Per-line Kg values are: line 1 (113066 Size M) = 9.10 Kg, line 2 (113066 Size L) = 5.20 Kg, line 3 (113470 Iron Mark Pin) = 0.39 Kg. Sum = 9.10 + 5.20 + 0.39 = 14.69 Kg. This matches certificate value exactly (0% deviation, well within ±0.1% tolerance). Exception 3D conditions all met: (1) certificate states total quantity, (2) invoice has multiple rows summing to total, (3) same invoice reference, (4) same unit Kg, (5) no extraneous rows included, (6) only rows for items matching certificate, (7) no unit conversion needed, (8) sum matches within tolerance. MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certificate states 14.69 KG NET. Invoice per-line weights sum to 9.10 + 5.20 + 0.39 = 14.69 Kg. Exact match via exception 3D (summation of rows within same invoice). MATCH.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: CN (CoO column for all three item lines)

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has explicit 'CoO' (Country of Origin) column. All three item lines show 'CN'.
comparison_steps.result: Origin CN explicitly identified in invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'CN'. Invoice: 'CN'. Identical ISO alpha-2 code. No normalization needed.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice's explicit CoO column.
All invoice lines share same origin CN – uniform origin verified.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'CN' as country of origin. Invoice has an explicit 'CoO' column with 'CN' for all three article lines. Exact match of ISO alpha-2 code. No normalization needed. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate states origin CN (China). Invoice explicitly shows CoO CN for all items. Exact match. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate. Standard verification applies.
PASS – Invoice number 776069 matches, consignor Volvo Merchandise AB found in invoice, consignee Volvo Group Korea Ltd found in invoicing address.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – 'Volvo Merchandise AB' found in visiting address block of invoice.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Country verification via indirect identifiers (VAT prefix SE)
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – SE prefix in VAT number confirms Sweden.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Priority order for consignee identification – invoicing field has priority
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – Consignee found in primary invoicing address field.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Country normalization for consignee: 'Korea, Republic of' ↔ 'Korea'
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – Standard normalization of country name.
MATCH – Article numbers 113066 and 113470 match exactly.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Priority 2 – Text matching of identity-bearing designations
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – 'Short Winter Jacket' and 'Iron Mark Pin (10 pack/10-pack)' match after hyphen normalization.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Direct identification of quantity in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: NOT_FOUND – No explicit total net weight 14.69 in invoice. Proceed to exceptions.
NOT_APPLICABLE – Both values already in KG.
NOT_APPLICABLE – Certificate states total weight, not per-piece.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Exception 3D – Summation of multiple rows within same invoice
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – 9.10 + 5.20 + 0.39 = 14.69 Kg. Matches certificate's 14.69 KG NET exactly. All conditions satisfied.
MATCH – Explicit CoO column shows CN for all items.
MATCH – All lines show CN, uniform origin.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Invoice header shows 'VOLVO' branding – could the consignor be 'Volvo' generically rather than 'Volvo Merchandise AB'?
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: The visiting address block explicitly states 'Volvo Merchandise AB' which is an exact match. No ambiguity.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Invoice invoicing address includes 'Volvo Construction Equipment' – could this be a different consignee?
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: The primary name in the invoicing address is 'Volvo Group Korea Ltd' which matches the certificate. 'Volvo Construction Equipment' is a sub-line, likely a division reference. The company name matches exactly.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Could the Kg values in the invoice be unit prices rather than weights?
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: The column header explicitly states 'Kg' and values are positioned in the Kg sub-column under 'Qty'. The values (9.10, 5.20, 0.39) are consistent with net weights for clothing items and pins, and sum to exactly 14.69 which matches the certificate's NET weight.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Volvo Merchandise AB, mottagaren Volvo Group Korea Ltd, varubeskrivningen (Short Winter Jacket och Iron Mark Pin), vikten (14,69 kg netto) och ursprungslandet Kina (CN) kan alla verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor (Volvo Merchandise AB) found in invoice visiting address. Consignee (Volvo Group Korea Ltd) found in invoicing address. Goods descriptions and article numbers (113066, 113470) match exactly. Quantity 14.69 KG NET verified via summation of per-line weights (exception 3D). Origin CN confirmed via explicit CoO column in invoice.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
